understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spike tiles that immediately end the attempt, and then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, within the per-attempt turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (optionally UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes), or reach the goal. CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks at a specified [x,y] to open/alter fall paths without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Attempts are limited by a turn budget, and landing on spikes ends the run and restarts the level for the next attempt.

understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spike tiles that immediately end the attempt, and then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, within the per-attempt turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (optionally UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes), or reach the goal. CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks at a specified [x,y] to open/alter fall paths without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Attempts are limited by a turn budget, and landing on spikes ends the run and restarts the level for the next attempt.
